reviewer: agent matrix pass (headless Chrome, real download+run, light+dark, mobile+desktop) — revision 1

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — real transformers.js audio-classification pipeline (Xenova/ast-finetuned-speech-commands-v2, q8) ran in a Web Worker on real Google Speech-Commands test clips: yes→yes (100%), no→no (99.99%), stop→stop (99.99%), up→up (99.98%); 341-397 ms WASM. conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 2✓ — loads-clean=pass, calls-real-inference=pass. screenshots: /tmp/w15b-scratch/shots/speech-commands/results-dark.png, reports/responsive/screens/speech-commands/desktop.png+mobile.png
rubric.notes: Distinct audio task from AudioSet AST: 35 short spoken keywords, not 527 general sounds.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — output is ranked {label,score} over the 35 command classes summing sensibly; the top label matched the spoken word on every sample tested with near-1.0 confidence. The See-inside spectrogram is a real 98×128 log-mel image showing the vowel/consonant structure. conformance: io-shape-semantic=manual (agent verdict recorded).

conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 5✓ — declares-model-id=pass (Xenova/ast-finetuned-speech-commands-v2 linked to card), declares-task=pass (audio-classification), declares-backend=pass (WebAssembly/WebGPU), declares-quantisation=pass (q8), inference-off-main-thread=pass (new Worker in speech.js). At-a-glance lists all 35 classes and the 16 kHz mono ~1 s input.

Agent verdict — fresh profile shows 'Download model (~83 MB)'; clicking it streams progress and the shared loader auto-inits to 'Model ready' (loaderState=ready) with a 'Clear cached model' control. transformers.js owns transformers-cache; the shared model-cache scans it by model id so a returning visit auto-inits with no re-download. conformance: shared-auto-init-loader=pass, auto-init-on-cached=manual.

Agent verdict — streamed download progress; Retry surfaced on load failure; decode/recognition errors go to a .status.err region; mic capture degrades honestly ('No microphone API here.' when unavailable) with sample clips as a fallback on every page. Runs on the WASM path with no GPU (headless no-GPU produced real recognitions). conformance: live-status-region=pass, errors-on-the-page=pass; honest-progress-retry-offline + runs-without-webgpu-fallback = manual.

Agent verdict — sample command chips, file dropzone (keyboard-operable), mic Record/Stop, audio player, Recognise button, the practical confidence slider + live listen Start/Stop + voice-pad, and the wild wake-word <select> + confidence meter + trip flash all operable; multi-model wake-word select + Route + Whisper handoff works. conformance: controls-operable=manual.

Agent verdict — every score bar + the top command come from the on-device pipeline run (verified real: yes/no/stop/up each recognised at ≥0.999 on real dataset clips). The spectrogram is computed from the actual PCM. No canned result. conformance: no-fake-output=manual.

conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 2✓ — images-have-alt=pass, buttons-have-names=pass. role=status aria-live status; aria-pressed sample chips; role=meter with aria-valuenow on the wake-word meter; labelled selects/sliders; ≥44px chips/selects.

Agent verdict — desktop 1280×800 (light+dark) and mobile 360×740 DPR3 both render with no horizontal overflow, legible text, wrapped at-a-glance table, and ≥44px controls; responsive-check programmatic pass (overflow ≤1px, 0 clipped, console+network clean) on both classes; screenshots reviewed. conformance: responsive-desktop=pass, responsive-mobile=pass, parity-both-classes=manual.

Agent verdict — the pipeline + log-mel spectrogram computation run in a Web Worker; the live listen mode uses a rolling window with a busy-guard so classifications never overlap or block input. Main-thread eval stayed responsive during load; 0 console errors. conformance: inp-stays-low=manual.

guidanceConsulted.query: keep INP low move work off main thread web worker
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Offload heavy work off the main thread; keep interaction handlers short.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the classification pipeline and the FFT/log-mel spectrogram run in a Web Worker; the live-listen loop guards with a busy flag so windows are classified one at a time without blocking input.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: headless: recognise 341-397 ms in the worker, main-thread eval responsive, 0 console errors

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel layout without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use flexbox/grid with flex-wrap and intrinsic sizing; canvases inline-size:100%.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — sample rows + field rows use flex-wrap; waveform + spectrogram canvases are inline-size:100% block-size:auto; the voice pad uses aspect-ratio with max-inline-size. responsive-check overflow ≤1px on both classes.

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible audio meter, live status region, form selects
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label every control; announce state in a live region; expose the meter with role=meter + aria-valuenow; adequate tap targets.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live status, aria-pressed sample chips, role=meter aria-valuenow wake-word meter, labelled selects/sliders, ≥44px chips/selects.

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible range slider and select controls
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Associate labels with inputs; use native form controls with visible focus.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — every slider/select has an associated <label>; sliders pair with <output>; native controls keep keyboard + focus semantics.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: keyboard-operable across all 5 pages; conformance buttons-have-names=pass

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page nav.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in the shared public/styles.css.

openQuestions: Live mic recognition of continuous speech would benefit from an energy/VAD gate so silence windows aren't classified as random keywords — worth an additive demo.
A WebGPU path could cut the ~350 ms latency; honest WASM fallback must remain.

followUpGoals.goal: Add a VAD-gated live keyword demo (Silero VAD → speech-commands) so the wake-word meter only fires on actual speech.
Add a WebGPU execution path for speech-commands with an honest WASM fallback.

summary: Revision-1 agent matrix pass for speech-commands: real ~83 MB download + on-device transformers.js audio-classification run verified in headless Chrome on real Google Speech-Commands clips (yes/no/stop/up each recognised at ≥0.999, ~350 ms WASM), with the real short-utterance log-mel spectrogram shown in See-inside. Live 'say a command' mic mode, a hands-free voice pad, a wake-word meter, and a Speech-Commands→Whisper router round out the ladder. Light+dark and mobile+desktop screenshots reviewed (no overflow, legible, ≥44px controls); all 5 pages load clean. 14/14 auto-checkable conformance assertions pass; 9 manual-evidenced dimensions carry the agent verdicts above.
